channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overloaded vehicle = fire hazard Shere House car park, SE1, 17th June
item.description:
Looks like this van is being used as a storage depot. Now has pallets balanced precariously on top

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trinity Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car has not been moved for over 8 weeks, 17th June
item.description:
Car not been moved for over 8 weeks Black audi L061 Emx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hemsted Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food units left on road, 17th June
item.description:
Hi Bromley, we are now having someone leaving three food units on our road and which are now even having graffiti variously being drawn on them, we had this in the past and you the had the unit removed, please can you do the same with these? Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes, 17th June
item.description:
Big hole

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lombard Wall, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole in road, 17th June
item.description:
Bad road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lombard Wall, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop line faded on A, B, D phase- required repainting Pedestrian stud faded on F,H,I phase- required repainting, 17th June
item.description:
Stop line faded on A, B, D phase- required repainting Pedestrian stud faded on F,H,I phase- required repainting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monsell Road, Finsbury Park, Greater London

item.title: Stop line, pedestrians stud, cyclists stud faded-required repainting, 17th June
item.description:
Stop line, pedestrians stud, cyclists stud faded-required repainting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rupert Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London

item.title: Lamps, 17th June
item.description:
Lights not working again tonight very unsafe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broad Oak Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste bin contents all over pavement and road, 17th June
item.description:
Looks like household waste contents all over pavement and road where an animal has opened it. Right beside the 354 bus stop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 108 Sandyhill Road SE18, 16th June
item.description:
Blocked street gully outside the property

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandy Hill Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 11 Sandyhill Road SE18, 16th June
item.description:
It’s been months of this mess. Sandyhill hill Road care is a disaster!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandy Hill Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead trees, 16th June
item.description:
Trees that were planted a few years ago didn’t survive and one was destroyed by kids “playing”. There was NO after care from the contractor who ever that’s might have been

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Margarets Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 237 Burrage Road SE18, 16th June
item.description:
Bins constantly left on the pavement blocking the path for buggies, kids going to school on scooters , elderly people with sticks etc. Also the ivy is taking over the pavement needs to be trimmed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is obstructing the path, 16th June
item.description:
The tree is hanging very low requiring most people to duck in order to walk under it. It is difficult for disabled people to pass by and dangerous to blind or partially sighted people. The problem is even worse during and after heavy rain when the water causes it to droop lower.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight is out., 16th June
item.description:
This light has been out for about 2 weeks. It is the second lamp in on Cornwall Road just off of Lancaster Road. As a woman working late it's an anxiety inducing stretch of Road as it is SO dark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Cornwall Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible hazardous nitrous oxide canisters, 16th June
item.description:
This item has been reported and was marked as 'resolved in May. Ref: 9517681 However, please note that the items are still at the location. These items need to be taken away.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydney Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned possibly stolen scooter, 16th June
item.description:
Scooter type used for food delivery left at side of road with some panels removed see photos. Reg LB23 NHB

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camelot Close, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Well Street building lights not on at 10pm, 16th June
item.description:
External building lights at Well Street on Frampton Park estate out at 10 pm. This is an ongoing issue that never seems to be fixed. All other buildings on the estate are lit up.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large differences between two slabs, 16th June
item.description:
This defect caused me to badly crumble my ankle resulting in a trip to A&E and a boot for 6 weeks. I have been referred for physio and it has impacted my job and life. I do not know how long the issue has been there. My accident took place at approximately 3pm on 30th May.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86, Crofton Lane, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 16th June
item.description:
For the third night in a row a white transit tipper van has reversed into the garages and dumped untold amount of rubbish before accelerating hard away with his lights off, spreading rubbish across the street.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westmount Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
